sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80754" key="pentaxoi/nikos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεντᾰ-χοίνῐκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n80754.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">containing five</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χοίνικες</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:168" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.168</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
